case_title: MONTI, PAUL VS AMADOR STAGE LINES,INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MONTI, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT AMADOR STAGE LINES,INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2000 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMADOR STAGE LINES,INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTI, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMADOR STAGE LINES,INC $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,048.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT AMADOR STAGE LINES,INC
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26205, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
MOTION TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF IN SUP. COURT AND SENT TO PRO TEM JOHN MCGUCKIN ON 4-7-00.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTI, PAUL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMADOR STAGE LINES,INC JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26205 ON 3-29-00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTI, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMADOR STAGE LINES,INC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,048.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26205 ON 5-18-00. (FROM A MOTION TO VACATE FILED IN SUPERIOR COURT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEALS FILING SENT BACK TO HANSON, BRIDGETT, MARCUS, VLAHOS & RUDY ATTY FOR DEFT. CASE ALREADY APPEALED & REMANDDED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTI, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMADOR STAGE LINES,INC $2,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,198.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26205 ON 12-22-00, FROM A MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
